case_title: ROYAL CROWN ENTERPRISES INC. VS BOUWTOUNAS, STEVE DBA VALLEY PRODUCE MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ROYAL CROWN ENTERPRISES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BOUWTOUNAS, STEVE DBA VALLEY PRODUCE MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROYAL CROWN ENTERPRISES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUWTOUNAS, STEVE DBA VALLEY PRODUCE MARKET $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOUWTOUNAS, STEVE DBA VALLEY PRODUCE MARKET
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BOUWTOUNAS, STEVE DBA VALLEY PRODUCE MARKET
